summary: Tested dark mode functionality on desktop and mobile - found critical mobile dark mode bug where inputs and backgrounds remain white instead of dark

ui_bugs.issue: Dark mode not working on mobile viewport - all backgrounds remain light/white instead of dark

integration_issues.issue: Theme toggle appears to activate but CSS dark mode styles not applied properly on mobile viewport

passed_tests: Login functionality works on both desktop and mobile
Theme toggle button is clickable on both desktop and mobile
Desktop dark mode works correctly (proper dark backgrounds and light text)
Desktop inputs show correct dark backgrounds (rgb(9, 9, 11))
Desktop cards show correct dark backgrounds (rgb(18, 18, 22))
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix mobile dark mode CSS - the dark mode theme is not being properly applied on mobile viewports. While desktop dark mode works correctly, mobile viewport still shows light backgrounds (rgb(249, 249, 251)) instead of dark ones. Need to investigate CSS media queries or mobile-specific dark mode styling issues.
